description: Rolling 7-day model performance: approval rate, JSON compliance, latency, provider fidelity — across all five Senate Loop roles.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS "LLM Calls" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false
SELECT count(DISTINCT base_model) AS "Models" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false

SELECT round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict='approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(count(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','rejected','json_fail') THEN 1 END), 0), 1) AS "Approval %" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false
SELECT round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / count(*), 1) AS "JSON %" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false
SELECT round(avg(latency_ms) / 1000.0, 1) AS "Avg Latency (s)" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false

SELECT round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(count(CASE WHEN model_verified IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END), 0), 1) AS "Fidelity %" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false

SELECT now() AS time, base_model AS metric, coalesce(round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict='approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(count(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','rejected','json_fail') THEN 1 END),0),0),0) AS value FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false GROUP BY base_model HAVING count(*) >= 10 ORDER BY value DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1

SELECT now() AS time, base_model AS metric, coalesce(round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict='approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(count(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','rejected','json_fail') THEN 1 END),0),0),0) AS value FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false GROUP BY base_model HAVING count(*) >= 10 ORDER BY value ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1

SELECT now() AS time, base_model AS metric, round(avg(latency_ms)/1000.0)::int AS value FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false GROUP BY base_model HAVING count(*) >= 10 ORDER BY avg(latency_ms) ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT base_model AS "Model", count(*) AS "Calls", round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict='approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(count(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','rejected','json_fail') THEN 1 END),0),1) AS "Approval %", round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / count(*),1) AS "JSON %", round(avg(latency_ms)/1000.0,1) AS "Latency (s)", round(avg(retries),2) AS "Avg Retries", round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(count(CASE WHEN model_verified IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END),0),1) AS "Fidelity %" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false GROUP BY base_model HAVING count(*) >= 3 ORDER BY "Approval %" DESC NULLS LAST

panels.title: Model Performance — 7 Days (sorted by approval rate)
Role Heatmap — Approval Rate by Model × Role

panels.description: Each cell: approval % in that role. Grey = no data. Red < 40% < Orange < 60% < Yellow < 75% < Green.

targets.rawSql: SELECT base_model AS "Model", count(*) AS "Calls", round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict='approved' AND role='A1_council' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(sum(CASE WHEN role='A1_council' AND downstream_verdict IN ('approved','rejected','json_fail') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0),0) AS "A1 Council", round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict='approved' AND role='A2_drafter' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(sum(CASE WHEN role='A2_drafter' AND downstream_verdict IN ('approved','rejected','json_fail') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0),0) AS "A2 Drafter", round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict='approved' AND role='A3_gate' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(sum(CASE WHEN role='A3_gate' AND downstream_verdict IN ('approved','rejected','json_fail') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0),0) AS "A3 Gate", round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict='approved' AND role='B1_solver' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(sum(CASE WHEN role='B1_solver' AND downstream_verdict IN ('approved','rejected','json_fail') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0),0) AS "B1 Solver", round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict='approved' AND role='B2_reviewer' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(sum(CASE WHEN role='B2_reviewer' AND downstream_verdict IN ('approved','rejected','json_fail') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0),0) AS "B2 Reviewer" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false GROUP BY base_model HAVING count(*) >= 2 ORDER BY count(*) DESC

panels.title: Approval % by Model × Role (7 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', timestamp) + (floor(extract(epoch from timestamp - date_trunc('day',timestamp)) / 14400) * interval '4 hours') AS time, base_model AS metric, round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict='approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(count(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','rejected','json_fail') THEN 1 END),0),1) AS "Approval %" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false GROUP BY 1, 2 HAVING count(*) >= 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

SELECT date_trunc('hour', timestamp) + (floor(extract(epoch from timestamp - date_trunc('day',timestamp)) / 14400) * interval '4 hours') AS time, base_model AS metric, round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / count(*),1) AS "JSON %" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false GROUP BY 1, 2 HAVING count(*) >= 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

SELECT date_trunc('hour', timestamp) + (floor(extract(epoch from timestamp - date_trunc('day',timestamp)) / 14400) * interval '4 hours') AS time, base_model AS metric, round(avg(latency_ms)/1000.0,2) AS "Latency (s)" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false GROUP BY 1, 2 HAVING count(*) >= 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.description: Rows where model_verified IS NOT NULL (OpenRouter only sends x-finalized-model header). Red rows = served model differed from requested model.

targets.rawSql: SELECT model_id AS "Model (ID)", model_string AS "Requested Model", count(*) AS "Calls (OR)", round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / count(*),1) AS "Verified %", string_agg(DISTINCT served_model, ', ' ORDER BY served_model) FILTER (WHERE model_verified = false) AS "Substituted With" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false AND model_verified IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model_id, model_string HAVING count(*) >= 2 ORDER BY "Verified %" ASC

panels.title: Model Substitution — OpenRouter (7 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT provider AS metric, round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN model_verified = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / count(*),1) AS "Fidelity %" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false AND model_verified IS NOT NULL GROUP BY provider HAVING count(*) >= 5 ORDER BY "Fidelity %" DESC

SELECT base_model AS "Model", count(*) AS "Calls", sum(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Failures", round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN json_parse_ok = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / count(*),1) AS "Fail %", string_agg(DISTINCT role, ', ') FILTER (WHERE json_parse_ok = false) AS "Failed In Roles" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false GROUP BY base_model HAVING count(*) >= 3 ORDER BY "Fail %" DESC NULLS LAST

panels.title: JSON Parse Failures by Model (7 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT base_model AS metric, round(avg(retries),2) AS "Avg Retries" FROM senate_telemetry WHERE timestamp > now() - interval '7 days' AND dry_run = false GROUP BY base_model HAVING count(*) >= 5 ORDER BY avg(retries) DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN pipeline_attempt = 2 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS value
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false

SELECT base_model,
       ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN pipeline_attempt = 2 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS retry_pct
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
GROUP BY base_model
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY retry_pct DESC

SELECT role,
       pipeline_attempt,
       COUNT(*) AS n,
       ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN downstream_verdict IN ('approved','approve','success') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS approval_pct,
       ROUND(AVG(latency_ms)) AS avg_latency_ms
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
  AND downstream_verdict IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY role, pipeline_attempt
ORDER BY role, pipeline_attempt

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN verdict_reasoning IS NOT NULL THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS value
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
  AND role IN ('A3_gate','B2_reviewer')

SELECT base_model,
       ROUND(AVG(LENGTH(verdict_reasoning))) AS avg_reasoning_chars
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
  AND role IN ('A3_gate','B2_reviewer')
  AND verdict_reasoning IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY base_model
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
ORDER BY avg_reasoning_chars DESC

SELECT timestamp, base_model, downstream_verdict,
       LEFT(verdict_reasoning, 200) AS reasoning_preview
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
  AND role = 'A3_gate'
  AND verdict_reasoning IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 25

panels.title: A3 Gate — Recent Rejections with Reasoning

targets.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp, base_model, downstream_verdict,
       LEFT(verdict_reasoning, 180) AS reasoning_preview,
       LEFT(verdict_issues, 200) AS issues_json
FROM senate_telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND dry_run = false
  AND role = 'B2_reviewer'
  AND verdict_reasoning IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 25

panels.title: B2 Reviewer — Recent Verdicts with Reasoning & Issues

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN ci_status = 'passing' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS value
FROM pr_outcomes
WHERE ci_status != 'pending'

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN merged = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS value
FROM pr_outcomes
WHERE merged IS NOT NULL

SELECT b1_solver_model,
       COUNT(*) AS prs,
       ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN ci_status = 'passing' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS ci_pass_pct,
       ROUND(100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN merged = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS merge_pct
FROM pr_outcomes
WHERE ci_status != 'pending'
GROUP BY b1_solver_model
ORDER BY ci_pass_pct DESC

panels.title: CI Pass Rate by Solver Model

targets.rawSql:
SELECT p.created_at, p.pr_number, p.issue_number, p.b1_solver_model,
       p.ci_status, p.merged, p.merged_at,
       p.pr_url
FROM pr_outcomes p
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT 50

title: QUASI Pauli-Test — Model Performance
